description_long: This object consists of a group of four irregularly shaped stones, each with a rough, natural surface and subtle variations in color, ranging from light gray to muted greenish tones. The stones vary in size, with the largest being broad and slightly flattened, while the others are smaller and more angular. Some surfaces display patches of moss or lichen, suggesting exposure to outdoor elements. The edges are mostly rounded, with occasional sharper facets and minor chips, indicating natural weathering. The stones appear dense and solid, with no visible cavities or artificial modifications. Their arrangement suggests they could serve as natural obstacles or decorative elements in an urban park or landscaped area.
description: A group of four weathered, irregular stones with rough, gray-green surfaces and natural mossy patches.
description_view_0: Three stones are visible from the front, with the largest stone on the right showing a greenish patch and the smallest stone on the left appearing flatter.
description_view_1: The largest stone dominates the foreground, while the other three are arranged behind it, revealing more of their top surfaces and angular shapes.
description_view_2: All four stones are visible in a line, highlighting their varying thicknesses and the smoother, lighter surfaces of the largest stone.
description_view_3: The stones are seen from above and behind, with the largest stone at the top and the others arranged below, showing more of their weathered tops and subtle color variations.
attribute_location: urban park, landscaped sidewalk, or roadside greenbelt
attribute_placement: set as a standalone feature or clustered with other stones on the ground surface
attribute_pattern: Irregular mottling and subtle veining, with patches of moss and lichen creating a natural, organic pattern.
attribute_weathering: Rough with visible signs of weathering, including rounded edges, minor chips, and moss or lichen growth.
attribute_integration_with_surroundings: Blends naturally with planted areas or grassy patches, partially covered by vegetation and harmonizing with other natural elements.
